# terrible_community_sap_libs_sap_user (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `conn_password` (String) The required password for the SAP system.
- `conn_username` (String) The required username for the SAP system.
- `host` (String) The required host for the SAP system. Can be either an FQDN or IP Address.
- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against
- `username` (String) The username.

### Optional

- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `client` (String) The client number to connect to. You must quote the value to ensure retaining the leading zeros.
- `company` (String) The specific company the user belongs to. The company name must be available in the SAP system.
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `email` (String) The email address of the user in the SAP system.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of name竊致alue).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `firstname` (String) The Firstname of the user in the SAP system.
- `force` (Boolean) Must be `'True'` if the password or type should be overwritten.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `lastname` (String) The lastname of the user in the SAP system.
- `password` (String) The password for the user in the SAP system.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `profiles` (String) Assign profiles to the user. Should be in uppercase, for example `'SAP_NEW'` or `'SAP_ALL'`.
- `roles` (String) Assign roles to the user.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `state` (String) The decision what to do with the user.
- `sysnr` (String) The system number of the SAP system. You must quote the value to ensure retaining the leading zeros.
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution
- `user_type` (String) The type for the user in the SAP system. `'A'` Dialog user, `'B'` System User, `'C'` Communication User, `'S'` Service User, `'L'` Reference User. Must be in uppercase.
- `useralias` (String) The alias for the user in the SAP system.

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
- `msg` (String) A small execution description about the user action.
- `out` (String) A detailed description about the user action.
